[event]
# Brazier sound effect
type=event
location=15,15,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[event]
# Treasure Chest
type=event
location=15,9,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,15,9,266
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Treasure Chest

[event]
# Urn
type=event
location=12,18,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,12,18,269
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/inventory/inventory_object.ogg
tooltip=Urn

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=8,8,12,12
category=il_common
number=4,6
spawn_level=hero_level,1
